subject: New Request: Data Engineer – Python
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: NordHealth
ROLE: Senior Data Engineer
START: 2021-04-16
DURATION: 6 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / on-site
RATE: 875 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Python, AWS, MySQL and Pub/Sub.

Key requirements:
• Python
• AWS
• MySQL
• Pub/Sub

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Maria Svensson
Senior Talent Manager
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 70 567 89 01
